title: Mongoose Schema Design Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on advanced schema design features in Mongoose.

questions.question: Which schema field property ensures that a value is automatically trimmed of leading/trailing whitespace?
What is the primary benefit of subdocuments in Mongoose schemas?
options: To increase performance through separate tables
To provide a way to embed one schema inside another for hierarchical data

questions.question: What kind of properties are 'Virtuals' in Mongoose?
options: Properties that are always stored in the database
Properties that are not saved to the database but computed from others
Properties that only exist on the client side

questions.question: Which schema option automatically adds 'createdAt' and 'updatedAt' fields?
How do you specify a set of allowed values for a String field in a Mongoose schema?
